message:
ci: Add GitHub Actions for testing and automated releases

Add comprehensive CI/CD infrastructure:

CI Workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml):
- ShellCheck linting with project-specific exclusions (SC2155, SC2034)
- Bash syntax validation for giil and install.sh
- Embedded JavaScript extraction and syntax validation
- Multi-platform installation tests (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest)
- VERSION file consistency check against giil script

Release Workflow (.github/workflows/release.yml):
- Triggered by v* tags (e.g., v2.1.0)
- Verifies script VERSION matches tag before release
- Computes SHA256 checksums automatically (checksums.sha256)
- Creates individual checksum files (giil.sha256, install.sh.sha256)
- Generates release notes with installation instructions
- Attaches all artifacts to GitHub release
- Auto-updates VERSION file in repo after successful release

VERSION file:
- Simple text file containing current version (2.1.0)
- Used by installer for upgrade detection
- Used by giil for opt-in update checking
- Automatically kept in sync by release workflow

This ensures checksums are always computed fresh during release,
eliminating the risk of checksum mismatches from forgotten updates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  shellcheck:
+    name: ShellCheck
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Run ShellCheck on giil
+        uses: ludeeus/action-shellcheck@master
+        with:
+          scandir: '.'
+          severity: warning
+          # SC2155: Declare and assign separately - too noisy for this codebase
+          # SC2034: Unused variables - some are used in heredocs
+          ignore_paths: node_modules
+        env:
+          SHELLCHECK_OPTS: -e SC2155 -e SC2034
+
+  syntax-check:
+    name: Syntax Validation
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Validate bash syntax - giil
+        run: bash -n giil
+
+      - name: Validate bash syntax - install.sh
+        run: bash -n install.sh
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+
+      - name: Extract and validate embedded JavaScript
+        run: |
+          # Extract the extractor.mjs content from the heredoc
+          # The heredoc starts with: cat > "$script_path" << 'SCRIPT_EOF'
+          # and ends with: SCRIPT_EOF
+          sed -n "/cat > \"\\\$script_path\" << 'SCRIPT_EOF'/,/^SCRIPT_EOF$/p" giil | \
+            sed '1d;$d' > /tmp/extractor.mjs
+
+          # Validate JavaScript syntax
+          node --check /tmp/extractor.mjs
+          echo "✓ Embedded JavaScript syntax is valid"
+
+  install-test:
+    name: Installation Test
+    needs: [shellcheck, syntax-check]
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Run installer
+        run: |
+          # Install to a test directory
+          export DEST="${HOME}/.local/bin"
+          export GIIL_NO_ALIAS=1
+          bash install.sh
+
+      - name: Verify installation
+        run: |
+          # Check script exists and is executable
+          test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/giil"
+          echo "✓ giil is installed and executable"
+
+      - name: Check version output
+        run: |
+          "${HOME}/.local/bin/giil" --version
+
+      - name: Check help output
+        run: |
+          "${HOME}/.local/bin/giil" --help | head -20
+
+  version-consistency:
+    name: Version Consistency
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Check VERSION file exists
+        run: |
+          if [[ ! -f VERSION ]]; then
+            echo "::warning::VERSION file not found"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+      - name: Verify version matches
+        run: |
+          if [[ ! -f VERSION ]]; then
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          FILE_VERSION=$(cat VERSION)
+          SCRIPT_VERSION=$(grep -m1 '^VERSION=' giil | cut -d'"' -f2)
+
+          if [[ "$FILE_VERSION" != "$SCRIPT_VERSION" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::VERSION file ($FILE_VERSION) does not match giil script ($SCRIPT_VERSION)"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          echo "✓ Versions are consistent: $FILE_VERSION"

@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  release:
+    name: Create Release with Checksums
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Extract version from tag
+        id: version
+        run: |
+          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          echo "Releasing version: $VERSION"
+
+      - name: Verify script version matches tag
+        run: |
+          SCRIPT_VERSION=$(grep -m1 '^VERSION=' giil | cut -d'"' -f2)
+          TAG_VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
+
+          if [[ "$SCRIPT_VERSION" != "$TAG_VERSION" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Script VERSION ($SCRIPT_VERSION) does not match tag ($TAG_VERSION)"
+            echo "Please update VERSION in giil before tagging"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          echo "✓ Version check passed: $TAG_VERSION"
+
+      - name: Compute SHA256 checksums
+        run: |
+          echo "Computing checksums..."
+          sha256sum giil install.sh > checksums.sha256
+          cat checksums.sha256
+
+      - name: Compute individual checksum files
+        run: |
+          sha256sum giil | awk '{print $1}' > giil.sha256
+          sha256sum install.sh | awk '{print $1}' > install.sh.sha256
+
+      - name: Generate release notes
+        id: notes
+        run: |
+          cat << 'EOF' > release_notes.md
+          ## Installation
+
+          ```bash
+          curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/get_icloud_image_link/main/install.sh | bash
+          ```
+
+          ## Verify Installation (Optional)
+
+          After downloading, you can verify the checksums:
+
+          ```bash
+          # Verify giil script
+          echo "$(curl -fsSL https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/get_icloud_image_link/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/giil.sha256)  giil" | sha256sum -c -
+          ```
+
+          ## Checksums
+
+          SHA256 checksums for this release are attached as `checksums.sha256`.
+
+          EOF
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
+        with:
+          name: giil v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          body_path: release_notes.md
+          files: |
+            giil
+            install.sh
+            checksums.sha256
+            giil.sha256
+            install.sh.sha256
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          append_body: true
+
+  update-version-file:
+    name: Update VERSION file
+    needs: release
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          ref: main
+          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+      - name: Update VERSION file
+        run: |
+          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          echo "$VERSION" > VERSION
+          echo "Updated VERSION to: $VERSION"
+
+      - name: Commit and push VERSION
+        run: |
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+
+          git add VERSION
+
+          # Only commit if there are changes
+          if git diff --staged --quiet; then
+            echo "VERSION file already up to date"
+          else
+            git commit -m "chore: update VERSION to ${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v} [skip ci]"
+            git push
+          fi
